analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class features defining the spellcasting ability.
analysis.quality: High quality. Clearly defines the spellcasting ability (Wisdom) and provides the necessary formulas for calculating Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Modifier, presented clearly in an HTML table.
analysis.mechanics: This is a fundamental mechanic for the Ranger class, establishing Wisdom as the primary spellcasting stat. The formulas provided are standard for spellcasting classes in 5th Edition.

recommendations.note: The inclusion of the explicit formulas for Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Modifier directly in the feature description is excellent for clarity.
